case_title: TRACEY, CHARLES M. vs. SCARMOZZINO, JONI

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 325 SUTTER ST #301, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. AS TO DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY, CHARLES M. SERVED OCT-18-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCARMOZZINO, JONI
